title: PersonInCustody
description: A person in DOC custody — the core operational unit, referred to internally as a P.I.C. (Person In Custody). Canonical schema reconciling the 'Daily Inmates In Custody' snapshot (7479-ugqb, 13 columns), 'Inmate Admissions' (6teu-xtgp), and 'Inmate Discharges' (94ri-3ium), plus the search keys used by the live Inmate Lookup Service / 'P.I.C. Lookup' (a073-ils-web.nyc.gov) — NYSID and Book & Case number. Keyed on INMATEID.

nysid.description: NY State Identification number — a live P.I.C. Lookup search key. Not published to Open Data.

bookAndCaseNumber.description: Book & Case number — a live P.I.C. Lookup search key. Not published to Open Data.

topCharge.description: Top charge / most serious charge ('TOP_CHARGE'), by penal-law code.

dischargedDate.description: Discharge date ('DISCHARGED_DT'); null while in custody.
